title: Display snapshot relationships in the UI
summary: Snapshot detail and snapshot views now surface recorded relationships as subtle connected-state metadata, with grouped relationship pages and dialogs that use canonical relationship labels and link to related snapshots.
userVisibleChange: Users can see when a snapshot corrects, supersedes, reverts, depends on, or relates to another snapshot without opening raw JSON.

decisions.title: Show relationships as quiet provenance metadata in snapshot hero areas instead of a loud primary card.
Use shared relationship formatting so canonical and future relationship types render consistently across the hero, dialog, page, and legacy related snapshots card.
